memoryArtifacts.description: Caerlaverock Castle, built by Sir Aymer Makuswell around 1270 and held by the Maxwell Clan until 1640.

memoryArtifacts.headline: Memoirs of Maxwells of Pollok
memoryArtifacts.description:
From Memoirs of Maxwells of Pollok, Page xlv.
III. --Herbert De Maccuswell, Sheriff of Roxburgh. 1140-1200.
Herbert's children:
Sir John de Maccuswell, also Sheriff of Roxburgh and Chamberlain of Scot …

popularStory.headline: Book Of Carlaverock - P582 1V
popularStory.description:
Aymer de Maxwell, fourth Lord of Maxwell, second of Carlaverock, and Chamberlain of Scotland. He married Mary of Meams, and acquired the Barony of Mearns, in the county
of Renfrew. 1241-1266, pp. 26, …

zh.lifeSummary: Aymer de Maccuswell 2nd Lord of Caerlaverock是Herbert de Maccuswell的兒子，於大約1195年出生在英國蘇格蘭度福利斯 安德 加洛韋凱爾拉維洛可。他於1240年之前與Mary Mearns在英國蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於1266年在英國蘇格蘭金加迪爾享年72歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Aymer de Maccuswell 2nd Lord of Caerlaverock是Herbert de Maccuswell的儿子，于大约1195年出生在英国苏格兰度福利斯 安德 加洛韋凱爾拉維洛可。他于1240年之前与Mary Mearns在英国苏格兰结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他去世于1266年在英国苏格兰金加迪爾享年72岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

en.lifeSummary: Aymer de Maccuswell 2nd Lord of Caerlaverock was born about 1195, in Caerlaverock, Dumfries and Galloway, Scotland, United Kingdom as the son of Herbert de Maccuswell. He married Mary Mearns before 1240, in Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died in 1266, in Kincardineshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 72.

fr.lifeSummary: Aymer de Maccuswell 2nd Lord of Caerlaverock est né environ 1195, à Caerlaverock, Dumfries and Galloway, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, fils de Herbert de Maccuswell. Il a épousé Mary Mearns avant 1240, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé en 1266, à Kincardineshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 72 ans.

Er hat vor 1240 in Schottland, United Kingdom Mary Mearns geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb 1266 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Kincardineshire, Schottland, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Aymer de Maccuswell 2nd Lord of Caerlaverockは約1195年にイギリススコットランドダムフリーズ アンド ガロワイケエルラバーオックでHerbert de Maccuswellの息子として生まれた。1240年以前にイギリススコットランドでMary Mearnsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は1266年にイギリススコットランドキンカーディンエシュアイアで72歳で死去した。

ko.Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Scotland: 영국 스코틀랜드 드프리스 앤드 갈로아이 카이를레이베록
ko.lifeSummary: Aymer de Maccuswell 2nd Lord of Caerlaverock(은)는 대략 1195년 영국 스코틀랜드 드프리스 앤드 갈로아이 카이를레이베록에서 Herbert de Maccuswell의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1240년 이전 영국 스코틀랜드에서 Mary Mearns(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1266년 영국 스코틀랜드 킨카딘실르에서 72세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Aymer de Maccuswell 2nd Lord of Caerlaverock nasceu aproximadamente 1195, em Caerlaverock, Dumfries and Galloway, Escócia, United Kingdom filho de Herbert de Maccuswell. Ele casou-se com Mary Mearns antes 1240, em Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1266, em Kincardineshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 72 anos.

ru.Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Scotland: каирлавирокк, думфриесь анд галлоуеи, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Aymer de Maccuswell 2nd Lord of Caerlaverock родился около 1195 г. в местности каирлавирокк, думфриесь анд галлоуеи, Шотландия, Великобритания. Его отца звали Herbert de Maccuswell. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Mearns перед 1240 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер в 1266 г. в местности кинкардаинешир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 72 лет.

Se casó con Mary Mearns antes de 1240, en Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió en 1266, en Kincardineshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 72 años.
